title: Partial index and BETWEEN issue
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (c1 Nullable(String), c2 Nullable(Int32), c3 Nullable(Float64));
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2, c3) VALUES (NULL, 5, 3.14);
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE '' BETWEEN c1 AND c2 IN (1);
SELECT '' BETWEEN c1 AND c2 IN (1) FROM t1;
key_bug_features: INDEX causes query malfunction with BETWEEN expression
